qa_pair.question: Create a Forgecast project named "Nebula", then call the list-projects tool. What exact integer does the "count" field report?
Create three projects named "One", "Two", and "Three" (in that order), then list your projects. What integer is in the "count" field?
Create a project named "Empty" and note its id. Call the list-assets tool for that project id. What integer does the "count" field report?
Call the get-asset tool with assetId "does-not-exist-123". The call returns a tool error. What two-word phrase does the error message end with?
List the available tools. How many tools does the hosted Forgecast MCP server expose?
In the tool list, does the health tool (forgecast_health) have readOnlyHint set to true in its annotations? Answer yes or no.
In the tool list, is forgecast_generate_image marked with readOnlyHint true? Answer yes or no.
Each project object returned by list-projects has exactly three fields. Which field name holds an ISO timestamp?
What is the name reported in the initialize response's serverInfo?
Call get-job with jobId "no-such-job". Does the tool return an error result? Answer yes or no.
How many tools does the hosted server list in total?
In the tool list, is forgecast_get_timeline marked with readOnlyHint true? Answer yes or no.
Create a project, then call forgecast_get_timeline for it. How many clips does the returned timeline contain?
Per the forgecast_set_timeline schema, which clip field selects the virtual-camera motion (e.g. zoom-in, pan-left)?
Per the forgecast_set_timeline schema, which timeline field attaches a narration audio asset that music ducks under?
Call forgecast_import_footage with url "http://example.com/clip.mp4" on a project you created. Does the tool refuse the non-https URL with an error? Answer yes or no.
The forgecast_health providers object reports capability arrays for image, video, publishers and four more modalities plus footage. Which modality key covers text-to-speech?
